content: Announced for the July 15, 2026 update, but not live as of this knowledge snapshot: Kazeros Act 1 Extreme for 8 players at item levels 1720 Normal, 1750 Hard, and 1770 Nightmare; Paradise Season 4; Solo Mode for Kazeros Act 4 and Kazeros Denouement; and an accessible Serca matchmaking mode with unlimited revives and no full-party wipe condition. Treat all roadmap timing as subject to change until release notes confirm launch.

Announced for August 2026, but not live as of this knowledge snapshot: Kazeros Act 2 Extreme and a server merge. Exact raid details, merge timing, and affected servers have not yet been confirmed in release notes.

topic: Announced September 2026 class and Base Camp
content: A new class with the working Western name Warpweaver is announced for September 2026 and is not live. It uses clock-hand weapons and time/space mechanics, with a Hit Master Time Manager style and a Back Attack Spatial Swordsman style. The name may change. Base Camp is also announced as a guided progression experience targeting item level 1700 with pre-enhanced equipment and no manual honing.
